required_preferences.fact: Will only eat out at restaurants with clear gluten-free and low-sodium menu options — refuses any dishes with wheat or gluten ingredients

supersedes.fact: Will only eat out at restaurants that offer clear low-sodium menu options — never orders blindly

required_preferences.fact: Afternoons are now reserved for online teaching commitments during the seminar term — personal activities only after sessions

supersedes.fact: Afternoons are now left unstructured for personal activities and rest — caring for his granddaughter is no longer part of his routine due to her relocation out of state

required_preferences.fact: Hosts monthly potlucks at his home — never lets anyone else take over hosting duties
Uses low-vision accessibility features on all reading devices and presentation tools — avoids small fonts and poorly contrasted visuals
Collaborates closely with retired educator peers in workshop planning, welcomes shared leadership for certain sessions
Organizes trivia nights based on California history for friends — never misses his turn to host

persona: A retired teacher who enjoys group tours with friends
